# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        choice(name: 'BuildCommand', choices: ['build', 'test', 'deploy'], description: '')
        string(name: 'CustomCommand', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom build command')
        string(name: 'TestScript', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom test script')
        string(name: 'DeploymentSteps', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom deployment steps')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build/Test/Deploy') {
            steps {
                echo "Selected build command: ${params.BuildCommand}"
                if (params.CustomCommand) {
                    sh "${params.CustomCommand}"
                }

                switch(params.BuildCommand) {
                    case 'build':
                        sh 'your-build-command'
                    case 'test':
                        if (params.TestScript) {
                            sh "${params.TestScript}"
                        } else {
                            echo "No custom test script provided"
                        }
                    case 'deploy':
                        if (params.DeploymentSteps) {
                            sh "${params.DeploymentSteps}"
                        } else {
                            echo "No custom deployment steps provided"
                        }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
